title: Nike India Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Nike India Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Nike India Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nike India Holdings Services:
Nike India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India Holdings Services!
